CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-09-20 20:38:40'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-09-20 21:40:30');
SELECT event_id, date_part('minute', event_time) AS event_minute FROM events;
SELECT event_id, date_part('hour', event_time) AS event_hour FROM events WHERE date_part('minute', event_time) > 30;
SELECT event_id FROM events WHERE date_part('minute', event_time) IN (SELECT DISTINCT date_part('minute', event_time) FROM events);
WITH event_summary AS (SELECT date_part('hour', event_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM events GROUP BY hour) SELECT * FROM event_summary;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INTEGER, registration_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1990-05-20 10:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '1991-06-15 15:45:00');
SELECT u.user_id, e.event_id FROM users u JOIN events e ON date_part('hour', u.registration_time) = date_part('hour', e.event_time);
SELECT e.event_id, date_part('day', e.event_time) AS event_day, date_part('minute', e.event_time) AS event_minute FROM events e WHERE date_part('year', e.event_time) = 1992;

SELECT e.event_id, u.user_id, date_part('minute', e.event_time) + date_part('minute', u.registration_time) AS total_minutes FROM events e JOIN users u ON date_part('hour', e.event_time) = date_part('hour', u.registration_time);
